calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-01-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-13-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kerry Sykes for and with Stephen Louie (Petitioner)

Ms. Sykes stated that she is not aware of any objections, and is satisfied that a significant search for heirs has been performed. The Court made reference to language in the Will "other beneficiaries to be detailed at a later date." Ms. Sykes stated that she thinks it is evidence of someone who doesn't know how to write a will. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. Status on Close of Estate is set for May 1, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Mar-28-2018 Continued To Apr-11-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
